raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch tappē ſawâ
Rappâ aprakts Usajus Dahrsâ/
un wiꞥſch Dehis Josijus tappē
tappe par Kehnizu wiꞥſch Weetâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXII. Nodalla.
Josijus tas rahmê Kehniſch leek ſtriprinaht/
kas fageſtis bija pee ta KUNGĀ Namma : 1.
Ilkijus atrohd tv Bauflihas Gramatu : 8.
Ko tas Kehniſch leek laſſiht : 11. Ta Pra,
weete Ulđa paſluddina/ kas Jeruſalemei un
Juḑdai notiks: 14/16.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "1. Osijus bija aſtonus
Gaddus wezz/ kad tas
par Kehnizu tappē/ un
waldija trihsdefinitis un weenu
Gaddu Jeruſalemē/ un wiꞥſch
Mahtei bija Jedida Wahṛda /
Adaja Meita no Bazkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. Un tas darrija/ kaſ tam
KUNGĀM labbi patieke/ un
ſtagaja eekſch wiſſeem Zelteemi
fawa Tehwa Dahwida / un ne
atkahpe nei pa labbo nei pa krei-
fo Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Un aſtotâ padeſmitâ Gad-
dā ta Kehniza Josijus/ fuhtiia
tas Kehniſch Sawanu Azalija
Dehlu/ ta Dehla Mesullama/to
Srihweri ta KUNGĀ Nam-
mā/ un Žazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Eij augſchain pee to Aug-
12, ſtu-Preesteri Ilkiju / un lai ſa-
mekle to Nandu/ kaſ ta KUN-
GA Nammā irr nesta/ ko tee
Sleegſka Sarqi no teem Lau-
dim ſakrahjuſchi/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Un lai to dohd teem Dar-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teem Remmescheem / u
tein Namma-Darritajeem/
Muhrneeekeim/ ka Kohki un zir
Akmini pirkti tohp/ to Nammu
atkat ſtriprinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Tatschu ar teem ne tap
Lahgadiba turretā par to Nandi
kas wiꞥſch Rohkā bija eedoht
jo tee darrija to peetizzigi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Tad Žazzija tas Augſtā
Preesteris Ilkijus us Sawan
to Srihweri. Es efmuu to Bau-
libas Gramatu ta KUNGĀ
Nammā atraddis. Un Ilkiju
dewe Sawanain to Gramatu
ka wiꞥſch to laſſitu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Pehz nahze tas Srihw-
rīs Sawans pee ta Kehnizā
un neffe wiꞥſcham Wehſtis a-
pakat/ un Žazzija: Tawi Kal
irr to Nandu/ kaſ ta KUNGĀ
Nammā atrasta ktua/ tamekla
fchi/ un to teem Darba-Peelu-
kotajeem dewufchi/ kaſ pahr
KUNGĀ Nammu eezelti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Un tas Srihweris S-
wans ſtahſtija tam Kehnizā
arridsan/ un Žazzija: Tas Pre-
steris Ilkijus irr man wee-
Gramatu devīs. Un Sawan-
laſſija to preekſch ta Kehnizā
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Kad nu tas Kehnizā
tahs Bauflihas Gramatu
Wa-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
